# awscc_cognito_user_pool_regional_configuration_attachment (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::Cognito::UserPoolRegionalConfigurationAttachment

## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `email_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--email_configuration))
- `lambda_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--lambda_config))
- `sms_configuration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sms_configuration))
- `status` (String) The status of the replica. Set to ACTIVE or INACTIVE.
- `user_pool_id` (String)
- `user_pool_tags` (Map of String)
